action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: need a fast end-to-end Minigrid RL pipeline with real environments, offline-compatible prediction, and immediate eval to validate contract and measure iteration time. Decision: implement a compact PPO trainer using Stable-Baselines3 with a custom Minigrid feature extractor over image+direction+mission, train briefly on the 7 required environments via a random-env wrapper, save checkpoint plus metadata, test predict.py locally on a tiny run, then submit eval.
action.command: mkdir -p local_eval_data && cp eval_config_local.json local_eval_data/eval_config.json && python train.py --total_timesteps 20000 --n_envs 8 --save_dir checkpoints/baseline && python predict.py --data_path local_eval_data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output local_eval_out.json && cat local_eval_out.json
